subcodes.first_line: O ye companions of the All-Merciful! When we cast our gaze upon the realm of existence, we observe that as the season of rain draweth nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی چون نظر در عالم وجود نماایم ملاحظه کنیم که چون موسم باران رسد
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @spiritual transformation, @agriculture, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
